name: AquaPulse Controller X1
description: Connected controller for smart pump and fluid handling systems.
end_of_life_strategy: Refurbish first, then recycle electronics and enclosure separately.

name: AquaPulse Controller X2
description: Higher-capacity controller for multi-zone pump networks.
end_of_life_strategy: Harvest serviceable modules, then recycle materials by stream.

name: AquaPulse Field Retrofit Kit
description: Retrofit kit that adds telemetry and remote alerts to legacy pump installations.
end_of_life_strategy: Return-to-manufacturer for module reuse and recycling.
